name: Contribution Score
summary: Adds up a user's comment-by-comment points to estimate how much value they contributed. Helpful, upvoted, and recent comments count more; downvoted comments and self-promotional patterns count less. Optional bonus when a proposal owner upvotes.
description:
### What this algorithm is
This algorithm estimates how much value a user adds through comments.

It gives each comment points, then adds those points across all of the user’s comments.

### What increases or decreases the score
- Upvotes help and downvotes hurt.
- Newer comments matter more than older comments.
- Comments that look like self-promotion can be discounted (commenting on your own proposal or replying to yourself).
- Optionally, comments upvoted by a proposal owner can get a bonus.

### What data is used
No file upload is needed. The algorithm fetches proposals, comments, users, and comment votes from DeepFunding Portal data.

### Outputs
- A per-user CSV with user_id and contribution_score.
- A JSON details file with a per-comment breakdown (useful for auditing and debugging).

inputs.label: Comment Base Score
inputs.description: Starting points every comment gets before vote impact, time decay, penalties, and bonuses.

inputs.label: Comment Upvote Weight
inputs.description: How much each upvote increases a comment’s points (higher means upvotes matter more).

inputs.label: Comment Downvote Weight
inputs.description: How much each downvote decreases a comment’s points (higher means downvotes hurt more).

inputs.label: Self Interaction Penalty Factor
inputs.description: Discount factor (0..1) applied when a comment is on your own proposal and/or is a reply to yourself (1 means no discount).

inputs.label: Project Owner Upvote Bonus Multiplier
inputs.description: Bonus applied only when a proposal owner upvoted the comment (1 means no bonus).

inputs.label: Engagement Window (Months)
inputs.description: How many months back comments are allowed to count; older comments are ignored.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: How quickly older comments lose influence each month (0 means no decay).

outputs.label: Contribution Score by User
outputs.description: Per-user CSV with columns: user_id (DeepFunding user ID), contribution_score (numeric score).

outputs.label: Contribution Score Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-user breakdown including per-comment scoring components and intermediate values. For debugging and auditing.
